content: Backend: add post-bail-out alpha-coverage check in `_run_background_matte`. When apply_alpha_intersection bailed out AND rembg-only alpha < 8% → delete item.
Mirror the same check in `clean_background_for_item` (the manual /clean-background endpoint) for parity
Frontend: harden workStore polish poll to handle 404 (deleted item) — remove from pending queue + closetStore
Verify: backend lints + restart, frontend lints, screenshot smoke test
Update plan.md with the fix details + remove the 'NOT applied this session' caveat
